title: Soul Explorer: Books of History (Old Testament)
description: Walk through Israel's rise, fall, exile, and return across the historic chronicles. Covers Joshua – Esther.

title: Soul Explorer: Books of Poetry (Old Testament)
description: Wander the wisdom highlands of suffering, praise, proverbs, and love. Covers Job – Song of Solomon.

title: Soul Explorer: Books of the Law (Old Testament)
description: Trace the foundation of Scripture — creation, covenant, and the giving of the Law. Covers Genesis – Deuteronomy.

title: Soul Explorer: Church History (New Testament)
description: Follow the Spirit-led birth of the Church from Jerusalem to Rome. Covers Acts.

title: Soul Explorer: Church Letters (New Testament)
description: General epistles offering encouragement, warning, and persevering faith. Covers Hebrews – Jude.

title: Soul Explorer: Major Prophets (Old Testament)
description: Stand atop the watchtowers of prophecy where kingdoms rise and fall. Covers Isaiah – Daniel.

title: Soul Explorer: Minor Prophets (Old Testament)
description: Twelve smaller voices, one mighty call to repentance and hope. Covers Hosea – Malachi.

title: Soul Explorer: Paul's Letters (New Testament)
description: Map the apostle's missionary epistles and the doctrines that shaped the Church. Covers Romans – Philemon.

title: Soul Explorer: Prophecy (New Testament)
description: Unveil the apocalyptic vision of thrones, beasts, and the New Jerusalem. Covers Revelation.

title: Soul Explorer: The Gospels (New Testament)
description: Four perspectives, one Savior — journey through the life of Jesus. Covers Matthew – John.
